$comment: Diffract universal tool registry. Each entry defines a third-party CLI the agent can use, across four layers. INSTALL fields (repo/ref/kind/patch/build/entry/bin) are consumed at image-build time by install-diffract-tools.sh to bake the tool into /sandbox/.diffract-tools/<name> and put <bin> on the agent PATH. CONNECT fields (secretEnv/configEnv/apiHosts/binaries/authHeader) are consumed at runtime by diffract-tool-connect.sh to wire the tool's credentials securely (OpenShell generic provider -> placeholder in sandbox -> real secret injected at egress; egress allowlisted to apiHosts, attributed to binaries). ADVERTISE fields (the optional 'skill' object: name/title/summary/tags/examples) are consumed at image-build time by advertise-diffract-tools.sh to emit a hermes SKILL.md under /sandbox/.hermes/skills/diffract-tools/<name>, so the agent DISCOVERS the tool in its skill catalog and knows it is pre-authenticated (install/connect make a tool runnable; advertise makes the agent aware of it). 'patch' is an optional shell command run after clone and before build, in the tool dir — use it for proxy-compat fixups (the sandbox routes egress through an MITM proxy; node tools must use undici/fetch, so an axios tool needs adapter:'fetch'). Add a tool = add an entry here; no Dockerfile edit.

tools.name: ghl
tools.patch: sed -i 's/axios.create({/axios.create({ adapter: "fetch",/' src/client.ts && sed -i 's/params\.q = opts\.query/params.query = opts.query/' src/commands/*.ts

skill.name: ghl-crm
skill.title: GoHighLevel CRM
skill.summary: List and manage GoHighLevel CRM data — contacts, opportunities, conversations, calendars, and invoices — via the pre-authenticated ghl CLI.
